title: Shi'idese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Shi'idese''' was the native language of the [[Shi'ido]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Lao-mon]]. Shi'idos venturing from their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] became quickly fluent in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].

Some [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] were still discussing if there was a written form of Shi'idese as of [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. It was clear that Shi'ido easily learned to write and read other languages.

{{Language-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-04-XX -->''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
